ddl.value: "minimum_minor" is null or "maximum_minor" is null or "minimum_minor" <= "maximum_minor"
ddl.name: application_compensations_range_check

ddl.value: ("state" = 'running' and "completed_at" is null and "failed_at" is null and "failure_code" is null and "failure_message" is null) or ("state" = 'completed' and "completed_at" is not null and "failed_at" is null and "failure_code" is null and "failure_message" is null) or ("state" = 'failed' and "completed_at" is null and "failed_at" is not null and "failure_code" is not null and "failure_message" is not null)
ddl.name: listing_check_runs_terminal_state_check
